title: Planned water outage: Borchards
description: GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned water...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned water outage on Wednesday 4 February from 09:00 to 16:00 facilitate construction work.


> The following areas will be affected:


- Badnall Street
- Borchards

In the event of any unforeseen circumstances that delay the planned work, the water outage will be rescheduled to a date that will be confirmed, from 09:00 to 16:00.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
